title: cardamine tenuis
intro: Cardamine tenuis, also known as narrow-leaved bittercress, is a small annual plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cardamine tenuis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in salads and as a garnish due to its peppery flavor.
